_comment: STARTER REVEAL — the three partners appear and the camera visits each in turn with its cry. relative+facingFrame so it plays wherever the lab table is; the three stand-ins are assumed in a short row in front of the player, in the ci_standin order (Skiddo left, Totodile centre, Hisuian Growlithe right). Trigger: 'cutscene play starter_reveal' the moment the starters appear (wire at the lab-entry / starter-spawn step). Cries derive from cobblemon:pokemon.<species>.cry. Tune the per-starter offsets to the real table with /cutscene record so each zoom centres its Pokémon.
